description: Calculate the 2023 corporate GHG emissions inventory for a portfolio of 150 properties in New York City using the energy data in ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/nyc_building_energy_2022.csv and the emission factors in ~/Desktop/epa_emission_factors.txt. Convert utility data to standard units and calculate Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions in Metric Tons of CO2 equivalent (MTCO2e). Save the results to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/ghg_inventory_2023.xlsx as a multi-sheet workbook containing an 'Emissions_Data' sheet and an 'ESG_Summary' sheet with portfolio grand totals (Scope 1, Scope 2, Total MTCO2e) and a list of the top 5 highest-emitting properties.
